message:
fix: improve safety and error handling across modules

- Fix UTF-8 safe truncation in safety.rs truncate_command
- Fix tombstone restore to check content existence and use record.is_directory
- Add path traversal protection to blob store
- Improve SafetyGate error handling when DCG unavailable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
